title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to the Tenant to Account with pending invite
scenario: Tenant info persists in Support > App screen when switching from tenant-linked account to account with pending invite
steps: 1. Log in to the Poly Studio Mobile app with an account that is linked to Tenant A.
2. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
3. Verify that Tenant A's tenant name and tenant ID are displayed on the support card.
5. Log in with a different account that has a pending invite but is not yet linked to any tenant.
6. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu → Support → App.
7. Verify that the tenant name and tenant ID are NOT displayed on the support card.
expected: When logged in with an account linked to Tenant A, the tenant name and tenant ID are displayed on the support card. When logged in with an account that has a pending invite but is not yet linked to any tenant, the tenant name and tenant ID are NOT displayed on the support card.
